heading: Apportionment of losses
label: 30525 Apportionment of losses

children.text: all claimants shall be paid in proportion to their respective losses out of the amount determined under ; andsection 30523 of this title
personal injury and death claimants, if any, shall be paid an additional amount in proportion to their respective losses out of the additional amount determined under .section 30524(b) of this title
